/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++17 -g -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libMY_CUDA_LIB.so -o libMY_CUDA_LIB.so CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/src/cuda/MY_CUDA_LIB_generated_CUDACache.cu.o CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/src/cuda/MY_CUDA_LIB_generated_CUDAImageUtil.cu.o CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/src/cuda/MY_CUDA_LIB_generated_SBA.cu.o CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/src/cuda/MY_CUDA_LIB_generated_SIFTImageManager.cu.o CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/src/cuda/Solver/MY_CUDA_LIB_generated_CUDASolverBundling.cu.o CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/src/cuda/Solver/MY_CUDA_LIB_generated_SolverBundling.cu.o CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/src/cuda/MY_CUDA_LIB_generated_cuda_ransac.cu.o CMakeFiles/MY_CUDA_LIB.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
